title: eryngium ternatum
intro: Eryngium ternatum, also known as Ternate Sea Holly, is a perennial plant in the carrot family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eryngium ternatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
